title: Support constraints on fixed-size array of class object members (#7170)

features.name: rand class with fixed-size unpacked array of class objects
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand member and a rand unpacked array of that class type
features.snippet:
class item_t; rand int value; endclass
class container_t; rand item_t items[4]; endclass

features.name: foreach constraint on array class member with inside operator
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a fixed-size array of class objects with an inside constraint on a member

features.name: constant index access constraint on array class members
features.description: Code should include a constraint comparing class object members at different constant indices of a fixed-size array

features.name: foreach with conditional constraint on array class member
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop with conditional expression accessing array class object members
